prompt: An original dark-fantasy striker unit called Lantern Reaver: an agile dual-blade wielder in a sleek low-profile leather-and-metal outfit, twin curved blades drawn and crossed, a small glowing soul-lantern hanging from their belt, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear dual-blade silhouette, swift crouched low-profile stance, dynamic warm amber lantern-glow rim lighting, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
